overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a desert highway at sunset toward a futuristic city skyline. The journey transitions from open arid wasteland through a small settlement and finally into a dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with distant city views

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed down an empty desert highway toward a distant futuristic metropolis

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cables running parallel to the highway
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible on the horizon against the mountains
arid desert rock formations and boulders scattered along the roadside
distinctive desert trees with spiky branches dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway stretching toward a distant cyberpunk city skyline. Power lines run parallel to the road on the left while rocky desert terrain and scattered Joshua trees fill the arid landscape. The vehicle maintains a steady high speed through the empty road as the golden hour sun casts long shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: small desert settlement called Rocky Ridge

events.description: passing the 'Rocky Ridge' billboard and entering the small settlement area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the small settlement, passing buildings and roadside structures

entered.detail: large weathered billboard displaying 'ROCKY RIDGE' in bold red letters
low-rise desert shacks and small commercial structures with corrugated metal roofs
bright yellow warehouse or industrial facility with large doors

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a small desert settlement marked by the 'Rocky Ridge' billboard. Low-rise buildings and a distinctive yellow industrial structure line both sides of the road. The open desert gives way to a more enclosed street environment with utility poles and parked vehicles visible along the roadside.

events.description: brief camera perspective switches to external third-person view showing vehicle shadow before returning to interior

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway toward the city outskirts, passing billboards and industrial structures

entered.detail: large commercial advertising structures and highway signs marking the city boundary
weathered advertising boards with corporate logos and neon elements
large gantry-mounted directional signs spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the settlement, the landscape returns to open desert with the city skyline growing larger ahead. Multiple billboards and commercial signs mark the approach to the urban zone. At the 45-second mark, there's a brief external camera view showing the vehicle's shadow on the asphalt before returning to the first-person interior perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with rocky walls and towering skyscrapers

events.description: entering the rocky urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides
sunlight becomes partially blocked by tall buildings creating mixed lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow urban canyon between rock walls and skyscrapers, approaching the city center

entered.detail: steep rock faces and cliff walls lining the left side of the urban highway
tall glass and steel towers with cyberpunk architecture rising on both sides
overhead road structures and elevated train tracks running parallel to the route
illuminated corporate advertisements and glowing building accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dramatic urban canyon where natural rock walls meet futuristic architecture. The vehicle drives between steep cliffs and towering glass skyscrapers as the environment shifts from open desert to dense cyberpunk cityscape. Elevated highways and neon signage become prominent as the road descends into the heart of the metropolis, with the golden hour sun creating a glare between the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from a desolate desert wasteland into the heart of a towering cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on a wide highway flanked by power lines and Joshua trees, with the golden hour sun casting long shadows across the arid landscape toward a distant skyline. As the vehicle maintains its pace, the open terrain narrows into the small settlement of Rocky Ridge, where low-rise buildings and yellow industrial structures briefly enclose the road. The scene then opens back into the desert, passing a series of commercial billboards and a brief external glimpse of the car's shadow before the city skyline looms large. Finally, the environment shifts dramatically into a dense urban canyon, where the road descends between steep natural cliffs and glass skyscrapers under a brilliant solar glare.
